approach: overview.tsv per-domain extraction (dbCAN_hmm UNION dbCAN_sub envelope coords); NO hmmsearch rerun
truth_slice_source: CAZyme3D_id50 structures labeled by all-kingdom CAZyDB.07142024 (accession/MD5), training-MD5 leakage excluded, single-family only
embedding: ESM-C 600M mean-pooled, 1152-dim; reference anchor bank reuses existing emb/ref2024.shard*.npz (337759 proteins)
